settings.question: What is my right size?
settings.answer: As Bluorng caters to the oversized fit, if you're unsure about sizing, we recommend going one size down from your regular size. For example, if you normally wear an M, you can go ahead with an S with us. Once comfortable, you can always upsize if you prefer a looser look. It's worth noting that our sizing chart is available on our website, which provides detailed measurements for each size to help you choose the perfect fit.

settings.question: What are the care instructions on the T-Shirts?
settings.answer: Machine wash works for all our tees. air-dry. avoid dry cleaning. Use cold water to avoid colour bleed & shrinkage. do not iron the print directly.

settings.question: How do our new drops work?
settings.answer: We usually announce our upcoming designs and collections on our official Instagram account -@bluorng We recommend following us on Instagram to stay updated with our latest releases and drops. Once the designs are announced, they are available to purchase on our website.

settings.question: What is a pre-order?
settings.answer: A pre-order is the reservation of an item that is available to purchase but will be shipped out based on the mentioned date. Please make sure to read the Product Description on orders that are of PRE-ORDER status.

settings.question: Where do we deliver?
settings.answer: We ship and deliver all our orders Pan-India and internationally in all 192 countries.

settings.question: Where is my order shipped from?
settings.answer: All orders are shipped from our warehouse in India. International shipping times may vary based on your location.

settings.question: What are the delivery charges?
settings.answer: We offer free shipping on orders above a certain amount. Standard delivery charges apply for orders below that threshold. Exact charges are displayed at checkout.

settings.question: Do you have a store pick up option?
settings.answer: Kindly reach out to either of the stores on call or whatsapp mentioning that you would like to have something purchased. Once billing is confirmed, the product can either be picked up in person from the store or can be delivered at the cost of the customer by booking a local courier service.

settings.question: When can I expect my delivery?
settings.answer: Standard delivery takes 5–7 business days. Express delivery options are available at checkout for faster fulfillment.

settings.question: Which courier do we use?
settings.answer: We partner with leading courier services to ensure safe and timely delivery of your orders. The courier partner is assigned based on your location.

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking link via email and SMS. You can also log into your account to track your order status.

settings.question: Why is my order not shipped after it is confirmed?
settings.answer: Orders are typically processed within 1–2 business days. If your order has not shipped after 3 business days, please contact our support team.

settings.question: Why is my order not delivered after the mentioned date?
settings.answer: Delivery delays can occasionally occur due to unforeseen logistics issues. Please check your tracking link for the latest update or reach out to us for assistance.

settings.question: How do I place an order?
settings.answer: Simply browse our collection, select your size and color, and add the item to your cart. Proceed to checkout, fill in your shipping and payment details, and confirm your order.

settings.question: Can I modify or cancel my order?
settings.answer: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 12 hours of placement. Please contact our support team immediately if you need to make changes.

settings.question: I received a wrong product. What do I do?
settings.answer: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please contact our support team with your order number and photos of the incorrect item within 48 hours of receiving your order.

settings.question: My product has a defect. How do I report it?
settings.answer: We strive for the highest quality standards. If you receive a defective item, please email us with clear photos and your order details. We will arrange for a replacement or refund promptly.

settings.question: What is your exchange policy?
settings.answer: We offer exchanges within 7 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in their original packaging with all tags attached.

settings.question: How do I initiate an exchange?
settings.answer: To initiate an exchange, log into your account, go to your orders, and select the item you wish to exchange. Follow the prompts to complete your exchange request.

settings.question: How can I contact customer support?
settings.answer: You can reach our customer support team via email, phone, or live chat on our website. Our team is available Monday–Saturday, 10am–6pm.

settings.question: Do you offer gift cards?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer digital gift cards in various denominations. They make for a perfect gift for any fashion lover. Gift cards are delivered via email instantly.
